target:
# Try with a different user agent and check if the issue is the wayback machine itself
curl -sk --max-time 30 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://web.archive.org/web/20040901/http://www.pokerroom.com/" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "img\|screenshot\|table\|\.gif\|\.jpg\|\.png" | grep -v "archive\|wayback\|logo" | head -20
